prompt:
On a silicone mat sits a tidy servo test rig: an Arduino Uno on a breadboard with a single hobby servo securely mounted beside it, jumper wires neatly strain-relieved, and a USB cable coiled toward a nearby laptop. A precision screwdriver and anti-static wrist strap rest off to the side, showing the rig was assembled carefully. The servo horn points forward with clearance to swing freely.

Render a 512×512 photorealistic, solarpunk-tinged workbench with soft, even lighting and no brand logos or readable text, keeping focus on the wired servo rig and its clean cable management.
